summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Jobflow AI job tracker with new Interview Prep features. All 9 specified features tested successfully. Backend interview prep APIs 100% working (generate, get, update). Frontend features verified: Interview Prep modal, Dashboard with job data, all existing functionality. AI generation working with expected 10-15 second response time.
passed_tests: POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/interview-prep generates interview prep with 9 questions successfully
GET /api/jobs/{job_id}/interview-prep retrieves saved prep data correctly
PUT /api/interview-prep/{prep_id} updates user notes and checked items
Right panel displays 'Prepare for Interview' button between score card and People section
Clicking 'Prepare for Interview' opens InterviewPrepModal with job title and company (TECHCORP INC)
Interview Prep modal shows 'Generate Interview Prep' button when no prep exists
AI interview prep generation completes successfully (10-15 seconds as expected)
Dashboard page shows empty state when no jobs exist
Dashboard page displays status count pills and applications table when jobs exist
Dashboard applications table shows: Senior React Developer, TechCorp Inc, Interview status
Job creation modal (Manual Entry) working correctly
Board page displays jobs in correct status columns
Right panel opens on job card click with CV match score and progress bars
Navigation working between Board, Dashboard, ATS Checker, Contacts pages
ATS Checker page loads with CV Analysis and Cover Letter tabs
All existing auth, CRUD, and AI endpoints still functional
